variants.title: Filtrec R160T250B Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R160T250B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R160T250B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 250µ, Outer Diameter: 130.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 64.5 mm, Length: 200.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.7 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 250µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.7 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHR57026 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec R160T250B
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHR57026 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec R160T250B
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHR57026 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Filtrec R160T250B. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHR57026 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.

variants.title: Donaldson P177652 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec R160T250B
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P177652 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec R160T250B
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P177652 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.
